name: MSI MPG Z690 EDGE WIFI DDR4 ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Support DDR4-5200+(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 4x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Intel 2.5GbE LAN - Intel Wi-Fi 6 - BT 5.2 (Z690EDGEWID4)
shortName: MSI MPG Z690 EDGE WIFI DDR4 ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: ATX Intel Z690 gaming motherboard with PCIe 5.0, DDR4-5200 support, and WiFi 6.
